description: CompositionBlack sneakers made with synthetic uppers, fabric lining and rubber sole shoe care1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washThese black sneakers from fila have an updated retro look that is perfect for urban wear. The multi-layered black uppers with subtle white panel strips enhances support and protection of the feet. The perforations on the toe box ensure ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them cool and dry. The black rubber sole with herringbone and circular grooves give greater grip while the pivot point enables greater multi-directional movement.
